steps.title: Identify the requirement
steps.content: The goal asks to compare the hardness of all three minerals.

steps.title: Find which choice accomplishes this
steps.content: Choice A directly ranks all three minerals by their Mohs numbers (diamond 10, quartz 7, fluorite 4), showing their complete hardness comparison. Choices B and D each compare only two minerals, while C merely describes the scale without providing the ranking. That matches choice A — A is correct.
